channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nicki Minaj Faces Legal Action Over Unpaid Legal Fees
item.description: A law firm that represented Nicki Minaj in a 2023 copyright case has filed a lawsuit against her in Los Angeles County Superior Court, claiming she owes KSh 29 million in unpaid legal fees. The firm, ...

item.title: Pakistan Enhances Security Measures Around Saindak Mine Amid Terror Threats
item.description: State Minister for Interior Tallal Chaudhry announced heightened security measures around the Saindak copper and gold mine in Balochistan following terrorist disruptions to supply routes. The mine's o...

item.title: Spain's Tactical Mastery Defeats France in World Cup Semi-Final – Stephanie Shaakaa
item.description: Spain’s 2-0 victory over France in the 2026 World Cup semi-final at Dallas Stadium was a masterclass in tactical dominance. The Spanish midfield trio of Rodri, Fabián Ruiz, and Dani Olmo controlled th...

item.title: Universities Struggle with Defining Antisemitism Amid Complex Debates
item.description: Australian universities face challenges in agreeing on a single definition of antisemitism, as mandated by new federal guidelines. The government requires institutions to adopt their own definitions t...

item.title: Bank of Canada maintains interest rates at 2.25% amid inflationary pressures
item.description: The Bank of Canada is set to deliver its fifth interest rate decision of the year, with economists widely expecting the central bank to keep its policy rate at 2.25%. Inflation has risen above three p...

item.title: ICTSI Achieves P2-Trillion Market Capitalization
item.description: The market capitalization of International Container Terminal Services, Inc. (ICTSI) has surpassed the P2-trillion mark, marking a significant milestone in the company's history. This achievement was ...

item.title: The Science Behind Winter Fatigue and Daylight Saving Time
item.description: The article explores the phenomenon of increased fatigue during winter months, linking it to the reduction in daylight hours and the impact of daylight saving time changes. It discusses how shorter da...

item.title: Impeachment court plans to investigate OVP and DepEd fund allegations by August 2049
item.description: The impeachment court is set to address allegations of misusing confidential funds from the Office of the Vice President (OVP) and Department of Education (DepEd) before August 2049. The case, which h...

item.title: Toronto Faces Worst Air Quality in World Amid Wildfire Smoke
item.description: Toronto has been ranked as having the worst air quality in the world as of July 15, 2026, due to smoke from forest fires in northwestern Ontario. According to IQAir, a Swiss air quality monitoring com...

item.title: US and Iran Escalate Conflict Over Control of Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The article details the escalating conflict between the United States and Iran, centered around control of the Strait of Hormuz. US military strikes on Iran have intensified, with the fourth consecuti...

item.title: Malinauskas' News Corp Dinner, New US Ambassador, and Antisemitism Commission Issues
item.description: The article discusses recent developments in Australian politics, focusing on Premier Peter Malinauskas' attendance at a private dinner hosted by News Corp, which has sparked controversy over potentia...

item.title: Tanzania's Progress on UN Sustainable Development Goals Highlighted
item.description: Tanzania has presented its Third Voluntary National Review (VNR) on the implementation of the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), showcasing advancements in key sectors like clean wat...

item.title: TRCN inducts 258 teachers to address education challenges in Nigeria
item.description: The Teachers Registration Council of Nigeria (TRCN) recently inducted 258 graduate teachers into the teaching profession during the 10th Induction Ceremony at Yakubu Gowon University, Abuja. This even...

item.title: Karnataka Government Clears Three Police Officers in Bengaluru Stampede Case
item.description: The Karnataka government has formally closed disciplinary proceedings against three Indian Police Service officers involved in the 2025 Bengaluru stampede incident that resulted in 11 deaths and over ...

item.title: Projected Fuel Price Cuts in August Despite Oil Price Volatility
item.description: The article discusses the anticipated reduction in petrol and diesel prices in August 2026, influenced by earlier dips in global oil prices and a relatively strong South African rand. Despite renewed ...

item.title: Impeachment Trial of Vice President Sara Duterte: Legal Dispute Over Financial Record Disclosure
item.description: The Senate impeachment court is deliberating whether to subpoena Vice President Sara Duterte's financial records, with her defense team arguing that such disclosure violates her constitutional rights ...

item.title: Zoe Sugg and Alfie Deyes remain largely absent from social media as fans speculate about their future online
item.description: The article examines the prolonged absence of YouTube personalities Zoe Sugg (Zoella) and Alfie Deyes from public social media after roughly six months without their usual online activity. The couple,...

item.title: Trump Threatens Strikes on Iran's Infrastructure Amid Escalating Tensions
item.description: President Donald Trump warned on Tuesday that the United States would expand military strikes against Iran, targeting critical infrastructure such as power plants and bridges, if Tehran fails to reach...

item.title: Ramaphosa's legal battle over impeachment inquiry and Phala Phala scandal
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa's legal team has argued that proceeding with the impeachment inquiry committee's proceedings could cause irreparable harm to his reputation and public standing. Adv Wim Treng...

item.title: MainPower Advises Residents on Electrical Safety During Rainy Season
item.description: MainPower Electricity Distribution Ltd has issued urgent safety guidelines for Enugu residents to avoid electrical hazards during the rainy season. The company's Head of Communications, Emeka Ezeh, wa...
